result: Successfully ported all 27 tools from .opencode/tool/ (SDK format) to packages/opencode/src/tool/ (Effect-based format). 18 tools required new Effect implementations (analytics, json-query, log-activity, preflight-check, produce-fragment, roadmap-deprecate, roadmap-init, roadmap-next, roadmap-prioritize, roadmap-progress, smart-bash, smart-bun, smart-find, smart-git, smart-grep, smart-sd, task-board, verify-handoff) plus 18 new description .txt files. 9 tools (comment-plan, curate-context, propose-plan, read-lib, read-messages, replace-symbol, rig-schema-validate, send-message, smart-write) already had existing Effect implementations. Registry.ts updated with imports, yield declarations, Tool.init calls, and builtin array entries for all 18 new tools. Typecheck confirms no new errors in tool files.
